title: Contact ALL8 Webworks | Website Performance & Growth
description: Start with a performance tune-up, maintenance plan, or full website build. We respond within 1 business day with clear next steps.

hero.subtitle: Whether you need a performance tune-up, ongoing maintenance, or a full rebuild — we’ll help you choose the right path.
hero.note: Tune-Ups from $950 CAD • Full builds from $3,000 CAD.

intro.title: Tell Us What You’re Looking For
intro.body: Fill out the short intake form below. We’ll review your current site, goals, and budget, then reply within 1 business day with clear recommendations.

steps.title: Submit the Intake Form
steps.description: Tell us about your business, your current website, and what you’d like to improve.

steps.title: We Review & Audit
steps.description: We assess speed, structure, conversion paths, and local visibility.

steps.title: Clear Recommendation
steps.description: We suggest a tune-up, maintenance plan, or full rebuild — based on what actually makes sense.

steps.title: Move Forward
steps.description: Flat pricing. Clear scope. No long contracts.

faqs.title: Common Questions
faqs.subtitle: Quick answers before you hit send.

items.q: Do you work on WordPress sites you didn’t build?
items.a: Yes. We can maintain, optimize, and improve WordPress sites even if we didn’t build them. If it’s extremely plugin-heavy or unstable, we’ll tell you upfront what’s worth fixing vs rebuilding.

items.q: What’s the best starting point: tune-up or full rebuild?
items.a: If your site is slow, not generating leads, or your ads are underperforming, the Performance & Conversion Tune-Up is usually the fastest win. If the site is outdated, structurally broken, or impossible to update, a rebuild makes more sense.

items.q: How fast can you turn around a tune-up?
items.a: Most tune-ups are completed in 3–5 business days once we have access and your priorities confirmed.

items.q: What do you need from me?
items.a: A website link, your top services/areas, and access to your hosting or CMS (if applicable). If you’re running Ads or have Analytics, we’ll request access to those too.

items.q: Do we have to do a phone call?
items.a: No. If you prefer, we can do everything by email. If a short call would save time, we’ll suggest it, but it’s not required.
Performance Tune-Ups start at $950 CAD. Maintenance starts at $150 CAD/month. Full builds typically start at $3,000 CAD depending on scope.

servicesHint.title: Not Sure What You Need?
servicesHint.body: That’s normal. Many clients start with a performance tune-up before deciding on a full rebuild. We’ll guide you based on real data, not guesswork.

cta.subtitle: Send a few details and we’ll tell you exactly what’s worth fixing — and what’s not.
cta.microText: Built in Canada • Clear pricing • Measurable results
